title: Rebuild 20 vs other anime series
wikitext:
[]: Rebuild 2.0 vs other anime series [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Fri Mar 19, 2010 11:22 pm Well, some questions haven't got an answer after a week of staying here. I'd better start something different. (Spoilers maybe,I'm not sure.). As I got from the poster of Rebuild 1.0, Mr. Tomoki Kyoda, who is the director of another anime called : Eureka 7,is also responsible in the making of Evangelion movie as drawing (画コンテ). And I also found that the scene in 2.0 (Rei and Shinji relationships) sounds like the two main characters in Eureka 7 too....I wonder what going on with that. Even more detail, is Shinji really think that Rei is a ordinary girl rather than a clone, so a bunch of romantic-like scene,which resembles(or looks like) the content in Eureka 7 too. This is my starting point of thinking about this topic. Well, it might be a complaint for some fans. But I hope it will be a different story after Shinji knows that there are many "Rei"s in NERV. Which makes him scared and find Asuka for help. ( Just want to show my understanding of NGE)

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sat Mar 20, 2010 12:42 am If anything Eureka 7 was influenced by Eva, not the other way around. Also we don't actually know for sure if there is more than one Rei in Rebuild (preview shot in Q trailer could still be a mindfuck), or if she's even technically a clone.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Mar 20, 2010 1:13 am Yeah.Eureka 7 WAS influenced by Eva.It wasnt the other way around.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Mar 20, 2010 4:03 am There s a lot of missing the point going on here -- OP is noting that the cycle is now complete, and that E7 staffers are working on Rebuild and influencing things back again. I've not seen E7 or 2.0 so can't really comment on how much the changes in 2.0 move the two together. The obvious shout out that has been mentioned before is actually the allusion to the final episode of Utena, with Rei in Anthy's place.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Sat Mar 20, 2010 4:11 am Yes because the series was a live-action puppet show (Wtf another anime?) Even more detail, is Shinji really think that Rei is a ordinary girl rather than a clone

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Mar 20, 2010 6:39 am Eh, i haven't seen E_7, so i can't comment on how much of it's influence can be seen in Rebuild. But even if there is, that's nothing new. The original NGE also referenced, homaged or just plain ripped off a lot of other creative products, and not just from the realm of anime. On the other hand, Tomoki Kyoda only worked on 1.0, and had no involvement with 2.0.

[]:             Quote Post by Xeroko » Sat Mar 20, 2010 11:26 am NemZ wrote: If anything Eureka 7 was influenced by Eva, not the other way around. Also we don't actually know for sure if there is more than one Rei in Rebuild (preview shot in Q trailer could still be a mindfuck), or if she's even technically a clone.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Mar 20, 2010 11:54 am I trust Anno enough to not take influence from shitty anime like Eureka 7

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Mar 20, 2010 12:48 pm The director of Eureka 7 worked on the original Evangelion as a storyboard artist I believe (as did the director of the first Fullmetal Alchemist anime, he handled the direction of most of the earlier more "Carefree" episodes of the show like Dance if You Want to Win). BUT the director of Eureka 7 has been hired on to be a storyboard artist on Rebuild and work underneath and following the vision of chief director Hideaki Anno. The Director of Eureka 7 is just another member of the staff working to compliment the Chief Director (Anno's) vision. The idea this Eureka 7 guy could drastically influence the tone and look of the final film is as ridiculous as if the Key Grip on AVATAR changing the feel of James Cameron's film. The man's an employee. Doing a job.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Sat Mar 20, 2010 1:38 pm well Rei DID say "if I die I can be replaced" which kinda points to it.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Mar 20, 2010 1:44 pm *Sigh* Evageeks 2.0 translation wrote: 01:37:19,996 --> 01:37:21,907 Shinji: Ayanami, where are you? 01:37:23,244 --> 01:37:25,244 Rei: It's useless. 01:37:25,245 --> 01:37:28,667 Rei: I can only live here. 01:37:28,668 --> 01:37:29,411 Shinji: Ayanami? 01:37:29,412 --> 01:37:31,780 Rei: It's alright, Ikari-kun. 01:37:31,900 --> 01:37:34,440 Rei: Even if I die, I can be replaced. 01:37:34.441 --> 01:37:35,630 Rei clones: I can be replaced... 01:37:35,659 --> 01:37:38,616 Shinji: No! There's no other Ayanami but you! 01:37:39,312 --> 01:37:41,312 Shinji: That's why I will save you!

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Mar 20, 2010 2:35 pm Anyone who's actually seen both Eureka Seven and Rebuild, like myself, should be laughing at the hilarity of comparing the two beyond a superficial level. They have nearly nothing in common. And Eureka Seven is not shitty, fuck you guys. D:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Mar 20, 2010 2:36 pm translation thingy wrote: Rei clones: I can be replaced...

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Mar 20, 2010 2:40 pm Yeah. They don't hide the existence of the clones. And it should work wonders for the story. At the end of 2.0 Shinji has shifted all his emotional longing from Gendo to Rei. Now the two really are at the state of "I have nothing else". Sooooo when Shinji finds out the truth about Multi-Rei it should be a real blow to him leaving him with nothing else. ...and then that busybody Kaworu is there. Wonder if that will put a kink into Gendo's laid out plans.

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Mar 20, 2010 2:42 pm If we get on a tangent of "Which of Anno's minions has his name written all over 2.0?", i would definitely say Tsurumaki. Understandable, what with him being the Man's right-hand Man, and i know he did a lot of work on the original NGE too, but all the hyperkinetic silliness in the fight scenes and the corny slapstick is very indicative of him. Plus, i find the Third Impact sequence at the end of 2.0 to be eerily similar to this scene from near the end of FLCL. The other tangent: i think the most prevalent clues that point towards Rei being a clone of Yui are the name-game (if son->Shinji, if daughter->Rei) and the fact that Gendo seemingly actually gives a shit about her on an emotional level. Also, that cut where Yui's face was juxtaposed with Rei's was as subtle as a sledgehammer. EvaGeeks translation wrote: 01:37:34.441 --> 01:37:35,630 Rei clones: I can be replaced...

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Mar 20, 2010 3:00 pm SaltyJoe wrote: but all the hyperkinetic silliness in the fight scenes and the corny slapstick is very indicative of him

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sat Mar 20, 2010 3:09 pm Xard wrote: what

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Mar 20, 2010 3:09 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Yeah. They don't hide the existence of the clones. And it should work wonders for the story. At the end of 2.0 Shinji has shifted all his emotional longing from Gendo to Rei. Now the two really are at the state of "I have nothing else". Sooooo when Shinji finds out the truth about Multi-Rei it should be a real blow to him leaving him with nothing else.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Mar 20, 2010 3:20 pm SaltyJoe wrote: Okay, who here besides me thought of Diebuster and FLCL when watching the more over-the-top parts of 2.0?

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Mar 20, 2010 3:40 pm I was reminded of Gurren Lagann when Mari went into beast mode. That's about it. Her green eyes...
summary: []: Rebuild 2.0 vs other anime series [SPOILERS]             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Fri Mar 19, 2010 11:22 pm Well, some questions haven't got an answer after a week of staying here.  AuraTwilight » Sat Mar 20, 2010 2:35 pm Anyone who's actually seen both Eureka Seven and Rebuild, like myself, should be laughing at the hilarity of comparing the two beyond a superficial level. They have nearly nothing in common. And Eureka Seven is not shitty, fuck you guys. D:

At the end of 2.0 Shinji has shifted all his emotional longing from Gendo to Rei. Now the two really are at the state of "I have nothing else". Sooooo when Shinji finds out the truth about Multi-Rei it should be a real blow to him leaving him with nothing else. ...and then that busybody Kaworu is there. Wonder if that will put a kink into Gendo's laid out plans.
